news.headline: $IBM IBM Q3 2024 Earnings

EastGroup Properties reported Q3 2024 with $1.13 diluted EPS (up from $1.07 in Q3 2023) and FFO at $2.13 (9.2% increase from $1.95 in Q3 2023). Operations reflected positive metrics, including an increase in net operating income, leasing rates, and acquisitions. The company is optimistic about growth opportunities, showcasing strong financials, and dividends.
news.summary: EastGroup Properties, Inc. reported its financial highlights for the third quarter of 2024, including a net income attributable to common stockholders of $1.13 per diluted share, a 9.2% increase in Funds from Operations (FFO) excluding specific gains, and a 5.5% increase in Same Property Net Operating Income for the same property pool. The operating portfolio was 96.9% leased and 96.5% occupied as of September 30, 2024. They acquired an operating property of 179,000 square feet for $36 million and started construction on two development projects totaling 310,000 square feet with projected costs of $40 million. They transferred three development projects totaling 735,000 square feet to the operating portfolio. The CEO, Marshall Loeb, expressed optimism about the company's performance and growth prospects. Dividends are up, with a 10.2% increase over the previous quarter. The company maintains a strong balance sheet and completed various financial transactions during the quarter. Projections for 2024 include an estimated EPS range of $4.64 to $4.68 and FFO per share range of $8.33 to $8.37. More details available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Waste Connections reported Q3 2024 results with revenue at $2.338 billion (up 13.3% YoY), net income of $308.0 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $787.4 million (up 17.3% YoY). The company raised full-year outlook to $8.9 billion revenue, $1.082 billion net income, and $2.91 billion adjusted EBITDA. Operating income was $475.3 million for the quarter. Employee retention improved with voluntary turnover down over the quarter. The company anticipates high single-digit EBITDA growth in 2025. Joint revenue contribution in 2025 from acquisitions in 2024 is expected at 2%. Dividend increased by 10.5%. Further information available at Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Waste Connections, Inc. reported better than expected third-quarter results with revenue reaching $2.338 billion, a 13.3% YoY increase. Net income was $308 million and adjusted EBITDA was $787.4 million, up 17.3% YoY. Adjusted EBITDA margin was 33.7%, a 120 basis point increase from the previous year. The company also raised its full-year 2024 outlook to $8.9 billion in revenue, with net income expected to be $1.082 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $2.91 billion. The company increased its regular quarterly dividend by 10.5% and is on track for acquisitions totaling over $700 million in annual revenue. Employee retention improved, with expectations of high single-digit adjusted EBITDA growth in 2025. The company plans to provide a fourth-quarter outlook on revenue and adjusted EBITDA on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: IBM announced Q3 2024 results: revenue $15.0B (up 1%), Software revenue up 10%, Gross Profit Margin at 57.5%, $9.1B net cash, $6.6B free cash flow. Growth in AI sector with $3B generative AI book. Loss from continuing operations at $0.3B. Expenses: S,G&A $14.8B, R,D&E $5.5B._DISCLAIMER: This is a summarized version of the news article.
news.summary: IBM reported strong third-quarter 2024 earnings, with revenue reaching $15.0 billion, up 1% and up 2% at constant currency. Software revenue saw a 10% increase, contributing significantly to the overall growth. Gross profit margin improved to 56.3%, up 190 basis points. Free cash flow for the year was projected to exceed $12 billion. Software segment revenue was $6.5 billion, up 9.7%, led by growth in AI and Red Hat. Cash flow from operating activities was $2.9 billion for the quarter, with free cash flow at $2.1 billion. The company returned $1.5 billion to shareholders in dividends during the quarter. IBM ended the quarter with $13.7 billion in cash and securities. The company projected constant currency revenue growth for the fourth quarter, with currency expected to be a small headwind. Free cash flow for the full year was anticipated to surpass $12 billion. These positive results were driven by strong momentum in Software and AI, reflecting IBM's effective business strategies.

news.headline: SouthState Corp (SSB) reveals Q3 2024 results; unaudited financial info for three-month & nine-month(hurricane challenges) period ended Sep 30.
news.summary: In Winter Haven, Florida on October 23, 2024, SouthState Corporation (NYSE: SSB) disclosed its unaudited financial data for the three-month and nine-month periods concluding on September 30, 2024. The company highlighted its performance amidst the difficulties faced during hurricane season.

news.headline: Century Communities reports strong Q3 2024 results with $1.1 billion in home sales revenue, 2,834 homes delivered, 2,563 net new contracts, and 305 communities—a 29%, 25%, 19%, and 21% YoY increase, respectively.
news.summary: In Greenwood Village, Colorado, on October 23, 2024, Century reported significant growth in their home sales with revenues reaching $1.1 billion, a 29% year-over-year increase. The number of home deliveries also saw a substantial uptick, reaching 2,834 homes, a 25% increase from the previous year. Additionally, there was a 19% year-over-year increase in net new home contracts, totaling 2,563. The company set a new record with a community count of 305, marking a 21% increase from the previous year.

news.headline: Viking Therapeutics reports Q3 2024 results, plans for obesity drug trials, NASH/MASH study presentation. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: A conference call is set for today at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss the upcoming End-of-Phase 2 Meeting for Subcutaneous VK2735 intended for obesity, scheduled for the fourth quarter of 2024. Moreover, the Phase 2 study for Oral VK2735 targeting obesity is projected to commence in the fourth quarter of 2024. Additionally, the outcomes from the Phase 2b VOYAGE Study of VK2809 focusing on NASH/MASH with fibrosis have been chosen for an oral presentation.

news.headline: Local PBS stations in New York and New Jersey launch "Your Election 2024" program to inform viewers before November elections.

Through a variety of programs and resources accessible at thirteen.org/YourElection2024, this initiative will offer insights into crucial election topics and facilitate voter readiness.

news.headline: Las Vegas Sands Q3 2024: Net Revenue $2.68B, Net Income $353M. EBITDA $991M (Consolidated), $585M (Macao). Low Hold affected EBITDA.

news.headline: Align Technology reported Q3'24 total revenues of $977.9 million, down 4.9% sequentially and up 1.8% year-over-year.
news.summary: Align Technology, Inc., a major medical device company trading on Nasdaq under the symbol ALGN, has released their financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The total revenues for Q3'24 amounted to $977.9 million, showing a 4.9% decrease from the previous quarter but a 1.8% increase from the same period last year. Align Technology is known for its Invisalign® System, iTero™ intraoral scanners, and exocad™ CAD/CAM software which are used in digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry.

news.headline: EQT surpasses goal to reach net zero Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions ahead of 2025 target.
news.summary: PITTSBURGH, October 23, 2024 - EQT Corporation, a prominent natural gas producer in the US identified by the NYSE as EQT, has become the inaugural large-scale traditional energy producer globally to successfully attain net-zero greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions for both Scope 1 and Scope 2. This milestone reflects EQT's dedication to environmental sustainability and signifies a significant achievement in the industry.

news.headline: Frank Quinn rejoining Align Technology as EVP & Managing Director of Americas Region, a leading global medical device company.
news.summary: Align Technology, Inc., a prominent medical device firm trading on Nasdaq under the symbol ALGN, disclosed the appointment of Frank Quinn as the Executive Vice President and Managing Director of the Americas region. Quinn, previously serving as Align's Vice President and General Manager for the U.S., will now oversee operations in the Americas. Align is known for its Invisalign® System of clear aligners, iTero™ intraoral scanners, and exocad™ CAD/CAM software for digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry.

news.headline: Whirlpool Q3 results: GAAP net earnings margin 2.7%, earnings per diluted share $2.00, ongoing EBIT margin 5.8%.
news.summary: For the second quarter in a row, MDA North America experienced sequential margin growth, thanks to promotional pricing strategies. In Q3, the GAAP net earnings margin was 2.7%, down from 5.5% in the previous quarter. Earnings per diluted share stood at $2.00, with a GAAP tax rate of 25%. The ongoing (non-GAAP) EBIT margin was 5.8%, slightly higher than the 5% recorded in the second quarter.

news.headline: LendingClub's Q3 2024: 25% growth in assets, $1.3B purchase of loans, acquired Tally's tech to boost products.

This was primarily propelled by the acquisition of LendingClub loans amounting to $1.3 billion. Furthermore, to expedite their product roadmap, Tally's Technology was purchased in October. news.headline: New video feature by Solana Meme Coin Factory turns dark as it's used for sharing child sexual abuse content; promptly removed.
news.summary: Pump.fun recently introduced a tokenized video feature that was quickly exploited to share illegal content involving child sexual abuse. The platform promptly took action to remove the harmful material.

news.headline: ServiceNow partners with NVIDIA to accelerate enterprise adoption of Agentic AI, using NVIDIA NIM Agent Blueprints for co-developing native AI Agents within the platform.
news.summary: ServiceNow, a leading AI platform for business transformation, has revealed a significant enhancement to its partnership with NVIDIA to boost enterprise integration of Agentic AI. Through the utilization of NVIDIA NIM Agent Blueprints, the firms aim to jointly develop native AI Agents integrated into the ServiceNow platform. This collaboration will facilitate the creation of user-friendly use cases driven by business expertise that customers can conveniently activate. NVIDIA and ServiceNow plan to collaborate on numerous AI projects, leveraging their combined strengths to drive innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Latest study shows home hemodialysis patients using Tablo experienced better quality of life and caregiver satisfaction.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a new low of 3.8%, with the number of unemployed individuals dropping to 6.1 million. Moreover, the economy added over 250,000 new jobs last month, surpassing expectations and marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. The data suggests a positive trend in the labor market, indicating a growing economy and providing opportunities for job seekers across various sectors. Additionally, the report highlighted a rise in wages by 2.5% compared to last year, indicating potential improvements in living standards for workers. These figures point towards a robust economic outlook and an optimistic forecast for the job market in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Churchill Downs Inc to open $40-50m HRM venue in Calvert City, Ky with 250 HRMs, sports bar, sportsbook, and simulcast center in 2026. Oak Grove Racing's 8th venue in Kentucky.
news.summary: A new historical racing machine (HRM) entertainment venue is set to open in Calvert City, Kentucky with an investment of $40 to $50 million by Churchill Downs Incorporated (CDI). The 23,000 square-foot facility will house 250 HRMs, a sports bar, a sportsbook, and a simulcast center, expecting to open early 2026. This venue will be an extension of Oak Grove Racing, Gaming, and Hotel, becoming CDI’s eighth historical horse racing entertainment venue in Kentucky.
